text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having woken up early, I take my time heading to
the academy so as to enjoy all I can of the fresh
morning air.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer. Isn't the weather
beautiful this morning?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I had a relaxing day yesterday. Or maybe it's
because of the nice dream I had last night...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well, in the dream, I was the wind, blowing across
a huge plain...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
My body was as light as air, and I could fly for as
long and as far as I wanted.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I bet I can run like the wind today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka appears fully revitalized and
brimming with drive and energy.
